title: set default event logger based on build tags
body:
once the default event logger was removed from libpod.conf, we need to
set the default based on whether the systemd build tag is used or not.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

In libpod.conf (default root location /etc/containers/libpod.conf or
/usr/share/libpod.conf, ~/.config/containers/libpod.conf rootless), set
events_logger to file
